name: Brazilian Law MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for querying Brazilian law databases — federal legislation, jurisprudência (case law), normative acts, and regulatory texts from Brazilian government sources. Enables AI agents to search, retrieve, and analyze Brazilian legal texts (in Portuguese) for legal research, compliance, and regulatory analysis.
use_cases: Searching Brazilian federal legislation for legal research agents
Retrieving specific laws and normative acts from Brazilian government databases
Analyzing Brazilian regulatory texts for compliance agents
Building Portuguese-language legal AI assistants with BR law knowledge
not_for: Non-Brazilian law jurisdictions (uses BR government databases)
Teams not working in Portuguese or with Brazilian legal context
Real-time legal advice (informational research tool only)
best_when: A Brazilian legal tech developer, law firm, or compliance team wants AI agents to query and analyze Brazilian legislation and regulatory texts from official government sources.
avoid_when: You need law from other jurisdictions. Also: legal content in Portuguese only — not suitable for English-only workflows.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses public Brazilian government legal databases.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — accesses publicly available Brazilian government law databases
pricing.notes: Brazilian government legal databases are public. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Brazilian government APIs have informal rate limits — respect with delays

known_agent_gotchas: Content is in Portuguese — agents must handle Portuguese text and legal terminology
Brazilian government APIs can be slow and occasionally unavailable
Legal database coverage may be incomplete — verify important references against official sources
Not a substitute for professional legal advice — informational research tool only
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public legal data — no sensitive data concerns. Brazilian government servers. Data in BR jurisdiction.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public legal data. No sensitive information. Government servers in Brazil.
